mapper.insert: INSERT INTO policy ( policy_type, title, content, required_yn, use_yn, update_date ) VALUES ( #{policyType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{requiredYn}, #{useYn}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT policy_no, policy_type, title, content, required_yn, use_yn, update_date FROM policy WHERE policy_no = #{policyNo}
SELECT policy_no, policy_type, title, content, required_yn, use_yn, update_date FROM policy WHERE policy_type = #{policyType} ORDER BY policy_no DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT policy_no, policy_type, title, content, required_yn, use_yn, update_date FROM policy ORDER BY FIELD(policy_type, 'buyer', 'seller', 'finance', 'location', 'privacy'), policy_no ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE policy SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, required_yn = #{requiredYn}, use_yn = #{useYn}, update_date = NOW() WHERE policy_no = #{policyNo}
